description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the laratools/ci:7.2 Docker image globally and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a test job in the test stage that uses the mysql:5.7 service, sets MYSQL_DATABASE=midori and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=secret, and runs `composer install --prefer-dist --no-interaction --no-suggest --no-progress` followed by `php vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never`. Add a deploy to heroku job in the deploy stage that overrides the image to ruby:latest, runs only on the master branch, is manual, targets the heroku environment with URL https://midori-backend.herokuapp.com, and executes `apt-get update -qy`, `apt-get install -y ruby-dev`, `gem install dpl`, and `dpl --provider=heroku --app=midori-backend --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY` to push the app.
